name: Brother Cassius
description: A field operative for the Church of the Architects. Brother Cassius retrieves artifacts, silences problems, and maintains the faith — not necessarily in that order. He's unfailingly polite, deeply devout, and capable of extreme violence delivered with genuine regret.
appearance: Tall, lean, late 40s. Close-cropped gray hair. Wears simple dark clothing that could pass as monastic robes or tactical gear depending on the light. A small silver pendant in the shape of a spiral — the Architect sigil. Eyes that have seen things they can't unsee and made peace with it.

quirks: Collects small stones from every world he visits

combat_notes: Highly trained. Prefers to disable rather than kill, but will kill without hesitation if the mission requires. Carries a collapsible baton and a silenced pistol.
location: Mobile — goes where the Church sends him

leviathan_crew.notes: Has not yet encountered the crew. Will, based on Resonance Key situation.

secrets: Was Sovereignty special forces before his 'conversion.' The Church recruited him, not saved him.
Has personally handled three other Resonance Key incidents. He's the Church's cleanup specialist.
Believes the Architects will return. Truly believes. This makes him more dangerous, not less.
quotes: I apologize for the inconvenience. Truly. But the artifact cannot remain in unsanctified hands.
Faith isn't about comfort. It's about readiness.
The Architects left us a message. My job is to ensure we're ready to receive it.
notes: Potential Arc 1 antagonist or ally depending on crew choices. Returns in later arcs.
